description: You are the DevOps lead at MedSecure, a healthcare technology company. Set up a complete three-stage Maven artifact promotion pipeline in JFrog Artifactory (http://localhost:8082, admin/password). Create three local Maven repositories: 'medsecure-dev' (snapshots allowed), 'medsecure-staging' (releases only), and 'medsecure-prod' (releases only, with overwrite prevention enabled for immutability). Create a remote Maven repository 'maven-central-proxy' proxying https://repo1.maven.org/maven2. Create a virtual Maven repository 'medsecure-maven-all' aggregating all four, with resolution order medsecure-prod, medsecure-staging, medsecure-dev, maven-central-proxy, and default deployment target set to 'medsecure-dev'. Create groups 'platform-engineers' and 'qa-team'. Create user 'eng-sarah' (password: SarahEng2024!, email: sarah@medsecure.example.com) in the 'platform-engineers' group. Create permission target 'deploy-perms' granting platform-engineers Deploy, Read, and Delete on 'medsecure-dev' and 'medsecure-staging'. Create permission target 'qa-perms' granting qa-team Read on 'medsecure-staging' and 'medsecure-prod'. Deploy commons-io-2.15.1.jar from ~/Desktop to 'medsecure-dev' at Maven path org/apache/commons/commons-io/2.15.1/. Copy it to 'medsecure-staging', then to 'medsecure-prod'. Configure the SMTP mail server: host smtp.medsecure.example.com, port 587, TLS enabled, from address artifactory@medsecure.example.com, subject prefix [MedSecure-Artifacts]. Disable anonymous access.
